title: Moderation update
body: Today’s high-severity moderation review is complete. We banned two accounts after validating abusive behavior: spam_wave_42 for posting phishing links across multiple channels, and toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. We also reviewed a mass-reported high-severity case involving core_maintainer and determined it was a false positive tied to brigading, so no action was taken on that account. The related reports have been closed. Please continue reporting clear abuse, and avoid dogpiling or retaliatory reporting.
